meta.title: Industrial Portfolio
meta.description: Utilitarian, technical, and precision-focused with modern responsive layouts

sections.headline: ENGINEERED SOLUTIONS
sections.subheadline: I build robust systems with predictable outcomes. No magic, just solid engineering. Precision. Reliability. Scale. Every system is architected with failure in mind and measured with data.

sections.heading: SPECIFICATIONS
sections.body:
I approach software engineering like mechanical engineering: understand the requirements, design the system, implement with precision, test thoroughly, and document everything.

My background is in distributed systems, infrastructure, and developer tooling. I care about observability, maintainability, and operational excellence. If it can't be measured, it doesn't exist. If it can't be automated, it's not scalable.

Currently based in Seattle, working on infrastructure that powers millions of requests per day. I build systems that fail gracefully, scale horizontally, and are a joy to operate.

items.title: MESSAGE QUEUE
items.description: Distributed message queue handling 10M+ messages/day. Exactly-once semantics, dead letter queues, and comprehensive monitoring. Built with Go and Kafka.

items.title: API GATEWAY
items.description: High-performance API gateway with rate limiting, circuit breaking, and request routing. Handles 50K+ RPS. Built with Rust and Kubernetes.

items.title: OBSERVABILITY STACK
items.description: Custom observability platform with metrics, traces, and logs. Built on Prometheus, Jaeger, and Elasticsearch. Unified monitoring across all services.

items.title: CI/CD PIPELINE
items.description: Internal developer platform for automated deployments. GitOps-based with progressive delivery and automated rollback. Reduced deployment time by 80%.

items.title: DATABASE MIGRATION
items.description: Zero-downtime migration tool for PostgreSQL. Handles schema changes, data transformation, and rollback safely. Migrated 5TB without downtime.

items.title: SERVICE MESH
items.description: Implementation of service mesh for microservices architecture. mTLS, traffic management, and policy enforcement. Secured 200+ microservices.

items.title: LOAD BALANCER
items.description: Custom L7 load balancer with intelligent routing, health checks, and autoscaling. Handles 100K+ concurrent connections. Built with Go.

items.title: LOG AGGREGATION
items.description: Centralized logging platform processing 1TB+ daily logs. Real-time search, alerting, and retention policies. Built with ELK stack.

items.quote: The most reliable engineer I've worked with. Their systems never break, and when they do, they've already fixed it before anyone notices.
items.name: Sarah Kim

items.quote: They saved us $2M in infrastructure costs through optimization. The migration they led was flawless—zero downtime, zero data loss.
items.name: Marcus Johnson

sections.heading: INITIATE CONTACT
sections.subheading: Available for consulting and full-time roles. Open to interesting infrastructure challenges.
